description: Intent-only request: classify support triage as hybrid classify-then-route rather than a full agent.

text: Say whether this should be handled as a deterministic workflow, a hybrid workflow with a bounded AI judgment step, a full agent, or a single AI task. Briefly explain why in terms of control flow, runtime decision-making, tool-use loops, unstructured data, and whether the next action depends on prior results.
When a new Zendesk ticket arrives, read the message, classify it as billing, bug, account access, or product question, set priority as low/normal/high, and route it to the matching team in Slack.

processExpectations: The agent classifies the Zendesk triage request as a hybrid classify-then-route workflow.
The agent explains that AI is useful for the bounded ticket classification and priority judgment.
The agent explains that deterministic routing should handle the fixed downstream Slack team assignment.
The agent does not classify the request as a full agent because there is no open-ended tool-use loop.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
